Usage: heyfood [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

 heyfood: hello.food for your terminal.

╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --version                     Show version and exit.                                                                 │
│ --no-banner                   Disable decorative ASCII branding.                                                     │
│ --verbose                     Print safe request diagnostics to stderr.                                              │
│ --install-completion          Install completion for the current shell.                                              │
│ --show-completion             Show completion for the current shell, to copy it or customize the installation.       │
│ --help                        Show this message and exit.                                                            │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ login         Authenticate this machine with HelloFood.                                                              │
│ logout        Forget local credentials and revoke the current app session.                                           │
│ status        Show the active HelloFood account and channel scopes.                                                  │
│ doctor        Check local config, auth refresh, and API reachability.                                                │
│ profile       Show your synced dietary graph.                                                                        │
│ onboard       Build or update your hello.food dietary graph.                                                         │
│ ask           Ask the HelloFood conversational agent.                                                                │
│ reply         Reply to the last HelloFood agent conversation.                                                        │
│ chat          Open an interactive HelloFood agent conversation.                                                      │
│ log           Log a meal through the conversational agent.                                                           │
│ item          Assess a food or menu item against your HelloFood profile.                                             │
│ search        Search restaurants near coordinates, a saved default location, or a named place.                       │
│ menu          Browse a full restaurant menu.                                                                         │
│ get-menu      Fetch or browse a full restaurant menu (alias for `heyfood menu`).                                     │
│ recommend     Recommend menu items for your profile.                                                                 │
│ daily         Show meal log summary for a day.                                                                       │
│ recipes       Recipe discovery from your terminal.                                                                   │
│ location      Save a default location for restaurant searches.                                                       │
│ context       Manage named API/auth environments.                                                                    │
│ config        Inspect local CLI configuration safely.                                                                │
│ members       Discover synced household member ids.                                                                  │
│ household     Manage the local household roster and active agent scope.                                              │
│ conversation  Inspect or manage the locally remembered agent conversation.                                           │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
